title: Volta a Menorca by Catamaran Sailing – Lluís Gay Trophy
location: Vuelta a la isla, salida y llegada en la base naval de Maó
description: A circumnavigation of the island by patí català (a light sailing catamaran) covering some 85 nautical miles in five stages, from Maó to Fornells, La Vall, Cala Galdana and Cala en Porter. This biennial sporting and cultural event champions sustainable sailing; the tenth edition is expected in early July 2026. Exact dates to be confirmed.
